---
id: retrieves-fog-of-war-hexagon-cell-ids
title: "Retrieves fog of war hexagon cell ids"
description: "Returns precalculated H3 cell ids covering the user's visited locations within the specified date range, used by the fog of war hexagon rendering mode"
sidebar_label: "Retrieves fog of war hexagon cell ids"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieves fog of war hexagon cell ids"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/maps/hexagons/fog"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns precalculated H3 cell ids covering the user's visited locations within the specified date range, used by the fog of war hexagon rendering mode

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
